---
title: ""
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: home-news
    contents: news/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    template: assets/home-news.ejs.md
    fields: [title, date, description, categories, path]
    max-items: 3

  - id: home-publications
    contents: publications/*/index.qmd
    sort:
      - "pub-status asc"
      - "date desc"
    template: assets/home-publications.ejs.md
    fields: [title, pub-year, pub-authors, venue, pub-status, pub-type, pdf, path]
    max-items: 6
---

::: {.hero-header}
::: {.hero-logo}
![](images/lablogo.png){alt="CALM Lab logo"}
:::

::: {.hero-text}
::: {.hero-title}
CALM LAB
:::

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Control of Attention in Life and Mind
:::
:::
:::

::: {.hero-intro}
The CALM Lab studies attention control across contexts of life and mind, combining cognitive science, neuroscience, and contemplative approaches to understand how attention shapes thought, performance, and well-being.
:::

:::: {.quick-grid}

::: {.quick-card .quick-card-blue}
<a href="/team/index.qmd" class="quick-card-link">

<div class="quick-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-people"></i></div>

### Team
Meet the researchers and students working in the CALM Lab.

<span class="quick-card-cta">View Team →</span>

</a>

:::

::: {.quick-card .quick-card-red}
<a href="/publications/index.qmd" class="quick-card-link">

<div class="quick-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></div>

### Projects
Explore our research on attention control, brain networks, and mindfulness.

<span class="quick-card-cta">View Projects →</span>

</a>

:::

::: {.quick-card .quick-card-green}
<a href="/contact.qmd" class="quick-card-link">

<div class="quick-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></div>

### Connect
Interested in collaborating, joining the lab, or learning more about our work?

<span class="quick-card-cta">Get in Touch →</span>

</a>

:::

::::

<hr>
<br>

## Latest News

::: {#home-news}
:::

<hr>
<br>

## Latest Publications

::: {#home-publications}
:::

<div class="pub-grid-more">
<a href="/publications/">View All Publications →</a>
</div>
